description: You are Diana Osei-Bonsu, Human Resources Manager at Crestline Medical Devices, Inc. (Louisville, KY). Create five personalized employment offer letters using Apache OpenOffice Writer based on the hire data (names, titles, salaries, departments, and start dates) and company boilerplate found in /home/ga/Documents/new_hires.json. Each letter must be addressed to the specific candidate and include their job title, department, salary, start date, work location, and employment type, reference the company benefits, and include a signature block for CEO Robert Flanagan. Save each document to /home/ga/Documents/ using the filename specified in the JSON data (e.g., offer_letter_Okonkwo_Amara.odt). Login: username ga, no password
